text:
3F = Therapy Changed — cost increased acknowledged 
3G = Drug Therapy Unchanged 
3H = Follow-Up/Report 
3J = Patient Referral 
3K = Instructions Understood 
3M = Compliance Aid Provided 
3N = Medication Administered 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: The T-MSIS Drug Utilization Code data element is composite field comprised of three distinct NCPDP 
data elements: "Reason for Service Code" (439-E4); "Professional Service Code" (440-E5); and "Result 
of Service Code"
